summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Event Registration System V2 (4-category rebuild) and Membership Plans Admin. All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: Step 0 Fee Overview displays 4 categories with both INR and USD fees, accommodation fees with FREE badge for students, premium hotels with room types and tax%, membership plans with INR/USD fees, additional persons fee. Step 1 shows 4 category cards (Member, Non-Member, Student, International) with phone lookup for members. Step 2 shows conditional fields (address+ID proof for non-member, college+bonafide for student), add-ons checkboxes, and 'Become a Member' option. Admin Membership Plans page fully functional with CRUD operations.

issues: International (USD) column may be cut off on smaller screens - table is horizontally scrollable but users might not realize

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well structured with REG_CATEGORIES (4 categories) and FEE_TABLE_COLS properly defined

EventRegistration model includes all new fields: registration_category, hotel_name, hotel_room_type, hotel_tax_percent, hotel_base_amount, additional_persons, wants_membership, membership_type, selected_addons, addon_fee
Backend registration-info API correctly returns fee_tiers, accommodation, membership_plans, additional_person_fee, registration_addons, premium_hotels
Membership Plans CRUD API properly implemented with enable/disable toggle
seed_data_creation: Test registrations created and cleaned up for: non_member, student, international, premium_hotel, additional_persons, addons, become_a_member scenarios
context_for_next_testing_agent: Event Registration V2 fully tested. 4 categories: member, non_member, student, international. Current tier is 'Early Bird' (deadline 2026-05-01). Test event has: 2 fee tiers, 2 premium hotels (The Oberoi 5-star 18% tax, Holiday Inn 4-star 12% tax) with room types, 2 add-ons (Pre-conference Workshop ₹1000, Excursion Trip ₹2000), free student accommodation, additional person fee ₹1500, membership registration enabled with 4 plans (academic/entrepreneur/corporate/international).

backend_apis.GET /api/public/events/{id}/registration: PASS - Returns fee_tiers, accommodation, membership_plans, additional_person_fee, registration_addons, premium_hotels
backend_apis.GET /api/public/members/lookup: PASS - Phone lookup works (returns found:false for non-existent)
backend_apis.POST /api/public/events/{id}/register (s: PASS - With college, bonafide_cert_url, free accommodation
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/events/{id}/registrations: PASS - Returns all registrations with new fields

frontend_elements.Step 0 - Registration Fees table: PASS - Shows 4 categories (Member/Non-Member/Student/International) with Early Bird CURRENT badge
frontend_elements.Step 0 - Accommodation Fees table: PASS - Shows fees with FREE badge for students, green text 'Free accommodation for: Student / JRF / SRF / RA / Retired'
frontend_elements.Step 0 - Premium Hotels section: PASS - Shows The Oberoi (5-Star, 18% tax, Deluxe ₹8,000/Suite ₹15,000) and Holiday Inn (4-Star, 12% tax, Standard ₹4,000/Deluxe ₹6,000)
frontend_elements.Step 0 - Become an IDSEA Member section: PASS - Shows 4 membership types with INR/USD fees
frontend_elements.Step 1 - 4 Category cards: PASS - IDSEA Member (₹3,500), Non-Member (₹5,000), Student (₹2,000), International ($200)
frontend_elements.Step 1 - Phone lookup for IDSEA Member: PASS - Shows phone input and Find button
frontend_elements.Step 2 - Basic fields: PASS - Name, Email, Phone, Qualification, Organization, State
frontend_elements.Step 2 - Non-Member conditional fields: PASS - Yellow section with Address & Identity Proof (Required for Non-Members)
frontend_elements.Step 2 - Optional Add-ons: PASS - Pre-conference Workshop (₹1,000), Excursion Trip (₹2,000) with checkboxes
frontend_elements.Step 2 - Become a Member checkbox: PASS - 'I also want to become an IDSEA Member' in green section
frontend_elements.Admin - Membership Plans nav link: PASS - Crown icon, visible in sidebar
frontend_elements.Admin - Membership Plans page: PASS - Shows 4 plans (Academic, Entrepreneur, Corporate, International Delegates) with Active badges
frontend_elements.Admin - Plan CRUD buttons: PASS - Toggle, Edit, Delete buttons for each plan
frontend_elements.Admin - Create Plan modal: PASS - Plan Name, Key, Fee INR, Fee USD, Description, Enabled checkbox, Create button
